synopsis: "Drone Alone" is a comic story by Christopher Cooper featured in the tenth issue of Star Wars Comic magazine, released in September of 2014. The story, set shortly after Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back, features Luke Skywalker, Wedge Antilles, Chewbacca and Lando Calrissian on a mission to steal hyperdrive components from the Galactic Empire.
title: Drone Alone
